headline: NVR's Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates, Homebuilding Revenues Down Y/Y
summary: NVR's Q1 EPS and revenues miss estimates as settlements fall 22% on a 15% lower opening backlog; shares drop 4.7%.

raw.headline: NVR's Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates, Homebuilding Revenues Down Y/Y
raw.summary: NVR's Q1 EPS and revenues miss estimates as settlements fall 22% on a 15% lower opening backlog; shares drop 4.7%.

headline: How Investors Are Reacting To NVR (NVR) Margin Squeeze Amid Higher Costs And Weaker Settlements
summary: NVR, Inc. has reported past first-quarter 2026 results showing net income of US$198.36 million, down from US$299.58 million a year earlier, alongside lower basic and diluted earnings per share from continuing operations. Beneath the headline earnings decline, new orders grew 7% even as settlements fell 22% and homebuilding margins were pressured by pricing and higher lot costs. We’ll now examine how weaker margins amid higher lot costs and softer settlements shape NVR’s investment narrative...

headline: NVR INC (NYSE:NVR) Passes Caviar Cruise Quality Screen with Stellar Profitability and Financial Health
summary: NVR Inc. passes the Caviar Cruise quality screen with exceptional 117.88% ROIC, strong profitability, low debt, and fair valuation. A classic quality holding for long-term investors.

headline: 2 Cash-Heavy Stocks for Long-Term Investors and 1 Facing Headwinds
summary: A cash-heavy balance sheet is often a sign of strength, but not always. Some companies avoid debt because they have weak business models, limited expansion opportunities, or inconsistent cash flow.
